projectDescription: A feature-rich Windows desktop file explorer built with C# and WinForms, integrating a media player, photo editor, audio/video recorder, document editor, data analysis suite, and music metadata fetching.
keyFeatures: File system browser with icon-based grid view and quick-access shortcuts
MP3/WAV/AAC audio player with playlist management, shuffle, loop, and metadata display
MP4/AVI/MKV video player powered by LibVLC with repeat modes and seek control
Photo editor with brightness/contrast/saturation adjustment, drawing, and crop tools
Audio and screen/webcam recorder using NAudio, AForge, and FFMpeg
Data Fusion Arena: import CSV, JSON, XML, TXT, Excel, Word files and databases (SQL Server, MariaDB, PostgreSQL) with automatic chart generation
Data Cleaner pipeline with column-type inference, validation, and error highlighting
Multi-format file editor for CSV, XLSX, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, JSON, XML, and PDF
Music metadata fetching via Genius API (lyrics) and Spotify API (album art)
Email export with MailKit for sending exported data files
publicApiSurface: Form1 — main file explorer window (LoadDirectory, AbrirReproductor, InitializeQuickAccess)
FormMP3 — audio player (AgregarYReproducir, AgregarALista, CerrarCompletamente, ActualizarPlaylist, ReproducirCancionActual)
FormDataBase — data fusion arena (ImportFile, ImportFromDb, ExportToDb)
DataReader — file import (LoadFromFile, ReadFromSqlServer, ReadFromMariaDb, ReadFromPostgreSql)
DataProcessor — data processing (DynamicSort, DynamicFilter, DynamicGroupSum, DetectDuplicates, AutoDetectSmartPairs)
PlaylistGlobal — global playlist state (AgregarCancion, ObtenerPlaylist, EstablecerCancionActual)
Desordenador — Fisher-Yates shuffle utility (Fill, Shuffle, Vector)
